divergences.claim: is_expired(age_seconds) returns True once a session is older than 7200 seconds — 120 minutes (2 hours). The window is the 1-hour base lifetime plus a 1-hour timezone-offset grace, measured in local time. A session under 2 hours old is still valid.
divergences.new_code:
def is_expired(age_seconds: int) -> bool:
    """Return True if a session of this age (in seconds) has expired.

    Expiry is measured in UTC against the base session lifetime.
    """
    return age_seconds > 3600
divergences.prose: is_expired(age_seconds) returns True once a session is older than 7200 seconds — 120 minutes (2 hours). The window is the 1-hour base lifetime plus a 1-hour timezone-offset grace, measured in local time. A session under 2 hours old is still valid.
